recommendations.title: The Working Class Goes to Heaven
recommendations.overview: After losing a finger in a work accident, an Italian worker becomes increasingly involved in political and revolutionary groups.

recommendations.title: Investigation of a Citizen Above Suspicion
recommendations.overview: Rome, Italy. After committing a heinous crime, a senior police officer exposes evidence incriminating him because his moral commitment prevents him from circumventing the law and the social order it protects.

recommendations.title: We Still Kill the Old Way
recommendations.overview: A leftist professor wants the truth about two men killed during a hunting party; but the mafia, the Church and corrupt politicians don't want him to learn it.

recommendations.title: One Way or Another
recommendations.overview: Set during a retreat of Christian Democrat politicians who practice spiritual exercises together, it is an allegory of corrupted power. Disturbing, claustrophobic settings are the background to a series of mysterious crimes.

recommendations.title: The Sting
recommendations.overview: A novice con man teams up with an acknowledged master to avenge the murder of a mutual friend by pulling off the ultimate big con and swindling a fortune from a big-time mobster.

recommendations.title: Rush
recommendations.overview: In the 1970s, a rivalry propels race car drivers Niki Lauda and James Hunt to fame and glory — until a horrible accident threatens to end it all.

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place
recommendations.overview: A family is forced to live in silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound.

recommendations.title: Advantageous
recommendations.overview: In a near-future city where soaring opulence overshadows economic hardship, Gwen and her daughter, Jules, do all they can to hold on to their joy, despite the instability surfacing in their world.

recommendations.title: Starstruck
recommendations.overview: Pop star Christopher Wilde has fame, fortune and a big-budget Hollywood movie awaiting him. But after meeting Jessica Olson, a down-to-earth girl from the Midwest, he is faced with following his heart or doing what's best for his career.
